text:
Market today: Mixed. AI expansion (Meta's data center) is a clear positive for your chip names, but a strong dollar could be a macro headwind for tech. Oil gains are less direct.

Your holdings: SOXL (-31.31%) and SPAL (-24.25%) demand immediate attention due to their leveraged nature and significant drawdowns. Remember, margin amplifies these drops. QQQI also needs trimming.

Watch: Monitor your leveraged ETFs for further decay and respect stops. Keep an eye on broader chip sector momentum, especially with AI infrastructure news.

Bottom line: Aggressively manage leveraged positions and stay alert to chip sector catalysts and macro headwinds.
plays: Consider reducing SOXL exposure given its leveraged decay and significant -31.31% loss; respect your stop at 200.
Review SPAL with its -24.25% loss and leveraged nature; consider respecting its stop at 21.38.
Consider adding to SMH on its scanner WATCH setup (entry 580.85-580.27, stop 574.18) given positive AI infrastructure news.
